roi_calculation: High - Automates authentication (JWT/MFA) and Stripe signature verification. Break-even point: 3 execution cycles.
maintenance_projection: Low - Auth and Payment Core are stable interfaces.
infrastructure_setup: CI Pipeline integration for Jest/Playwright; Stripe Test Mode API Keys; Cognito Test User Pool.
success_metrics: 100% Pass rate on Auth & MFA flows; <10min feedback loop on PRs; Zero critical security regressions.
risk_factors: MFA flow automation complexity; Stripe webhook signature mocking.
mitigation_strategies: Use TOTP generator library for MFA automation; Middleware isolation for webhook testing.
business_value: Secures entry points and financial gateways immediately. Prevents blocking issues in User Onboarding and Payments.

roi_calculation: Immediate - Replaces complex manual validation of financial ledgers and AI extraction logic. Break-even: 2 execution cycles.
maintenance_projection: Medium - Ledger logic is strict; AI extraction schemas may evolve.
infrastructure_setup: Dockerized RabbitMQ and Postgres (pgvector) for integration tests; S3 LocalStack.
success_metrics: 100% Financial Ledger accuracy in regression; Validates SOW extraction schema compliance.
risk_factors: Flakiness in async RabbitMQ consumer tests; Data state management for financial ledgers.
mitigation_strategies: Implement robust test data seeding/teardown; Use polling/await patterns for async message queue tests.
business_value: Ensures integrity of revenue-generating features (Invoices/Payouts) and core value prop (AI Matching).

roi_calculation: High - Covers high-traffic paths (Vendor Proposal Submission, Admin Dashboard). Break-even: 4 execution cycles.
maintenance_projection: Medium/High - UI changes will require selector updates.
infrastructure_setup: MailHog for intercepting email notifications; Parallelized E2E runners.
success_metrics: Full coverage of 'Happy Path' user stories (Vendor Registration -> Proposal -> Award).
risk_factors: UI volatility in early sprints; Testing third-party iframes (Stripe Elements).
mitigation_strategies: Use `data-testid` attributes in React components; Mock Stripe Elements where possible or use specialized test cards.
business_value: Guarantees usability of the platform for end-users (Clients/Vendors); Validates cross-service orchestration.

roi_calculation: Medium - Prevents costly outages during scale-up. Value increases with user base growth.
maintenance_projection: Low - Performance scripts change less frequently than functional logic.
infrastructure_setup: Dedicated Load Test Environment (matching Prod config); k6 Cloud or clustered runners.
success_metrics: Verifies API < 250ms p95; Validates vector search scaling; Confirms Bulk Import throughput.
risk_factors: Test environment costs; Difficulty simulating realistic vector search load.
mitigation_strategies: Schedule load tests during off-peak hours; Use synthetic data generation for massive vector datasets.
business_value: Proves system can handle enterprise load (1k+ users, 50k vendors) ensuring SLA compliance.

roi_calculation: High (Risk Avoidance) - Mitigates legal/compliance penalties (GDPR/WCAG). Hard to quantify but critical.
maintenance_projection: Low - Automated scans require little maintenance once configured.
infrastructure_setup: ZAP integration in CI/CD pipeline; Axe-core reporting dashboard.
success_metrics: Zero Critical/High security vulnerabilities; WCAG 2.1 AA Compliance pass.
risk_factors: False positives blocking deployments; Scan duration impacting build times.
mitigation_strategies: Tune security rule sets to reduce noise; Run full scans nightly/weekly rather than per-commit.
business_value: Essential for SOC 2 certification and Enterprise sales enablement.
